items.title: Margins Flat, Innovation High: Is PG Trading Growth for Stability?
items.description: Procter & Gamble leans on major product upgrades and flat margins to balance stability with growth amid soft demand and uncertainty.

items.title: Procter & Gamble vs. Church & Dwight: Which Household Stock Outshines?
items.description: PG and CHD battle for household dominance, with shifting demand, pricing power and strategy defining which name holds the edge.

items.title: United States Air Fresheners Market Report 2025: Consumer Trends & Forecasts to 2033
items.author: Research And Markets
items.description: The US air fresheners market is projected to grow from $2.71 billion in 2024 to $3.86 billion by 2033, driven by consumer preferences for home and car fragrances, with a 4.02% CAGR. Market growth is fueled by increasing demand for personalized, hygienic fragrance solutions across residential, automotive, and commercial sectors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Introduced innovative Febreze Airia smart fragrance dispenser with patented SmartJet technology, demonstrating product innovation and market leadership
Mentioned as a key market player without specific details about recent performance or innovations

items.title: Layoffs are piling up, raising worker anxiety. Here are some companies that have cut jobs recently
items.description: It’s a tough time to be looking for a job.  Amid wider economic uncertainty, some analysts have said that businesses are at a “no-hire, no fire” standstill.  Others cite corporate restructuring more broadly — or are redirecting money to artificial intelligence.
